tasks.label: Check Git Deploy Context
args: git status --short; echo '---'; git branch --show-current; echo '---'; git remote -v

tasks.label: Commit and Git Deploy
args: git add -A; git commit -m "Deploy latest site updates: audio fixes, temple header fix, and content sync"; git push

tasks.label: Git Inspect Context
args: git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree; git branch --show-current; git remote -v; git status --short
